name: Baker
ability: Each night, learn 2 players, at least 1 of which is good.

name: Glassblower
ability: Each night, learn the length of a line of players of the same alignment.

name: Observer
ability: Each night, choose a player: you learn how many reminder tokens are on them.
flavor: Alright, you, a little to the left, and you, shoulders back. Okay, now everyone, say cheese! (v1.0)
firstNightReminder: The Observer chooses a player. Give a finger signal.
otherNightReminder: The Observer chooses a player. Give a finger signal.

name: Wrangler
ability: Once per game, at night, guess exactly which Outsider characters are in play: if correct, they are drunk from now on.
flavor: You need to be one with them; breathe the air they breathe, feel the wind they feel, feel next season's harvest under your hooves. Tread carefully and make sure to never ride with cowards. (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: The Wrangler might guess any amount of Outsider characters. :reminder: ?:reminder:s
otherNightReminder: The Wrangler might guess any amount of Outsider characters. :reminder: ?:reminder:s

jinxes.reason: If the Flail is drunk from the Wrangler's ability, the Flail loses their ability.

name: Bartender
ability: If you guess (once) an opposing player, they are drunk.

jinxes.reason: If the Bartender chooses the opposing Leviathan, the Leviathan is drunk until dusk.

name: Mob Boss
ability: The 1st time you publicly say "Get 'em boys!" while nominating, if the nominee is not the Demon, they are executed immediately.

name: Kruger
ability: All Townsfolk abilities yield false info.
flavor: make the flavor text a reference to reverse transmission (v1.0)

name: Bloodletter
ability: Each night*, good players that choose you with their ability die. [Might be a Minion]
flavor: Trust me, you don't need it as much as I do. (v2.1)

name: Tardigrade
ability: On your 1st night, choose a player: (if not the Demon) you register as their character, alignment, gain their character's ability, & they are poisoned.
firstNightReminder: The Tardigrade points to a player. If necessary, swap their character token. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Queen
ability: There must be an alive Demon. If just 3 players live, you lose this ability.

jinxes.reason: If an Alchemist Queen dies, the game continues.
If the Storyteller would gain the Queen ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.

name: Moonlit
ability: You think you are a Townsfolk character, but you are not. Each night*, one of your alive neighbors might die. [Evil characters are Moonlit. +1 Outsider]

jinxes.reason: If the Hatter dies, a Moonlit may choose a Demon character to become and the other Moonlit may choose Minion characters to become.

name: Deputy
ability: Each night, choose an alignment to become. You don't know the Demon. You can't be exiled.
firstNightReminder: The Deputy gives a thumbs up or a thumbs down.
otherNightReminder: The Deputy gives a thumbs up or a thumbs down.

name: Snafu
ability: If the Storyteller makes a mistake, all players know this & the black sliver gets bigger.
flavor: Don't worry about it. Don't worry about it! You really don't need to worry about it. (v1.0)
